languages.text: {n}Огромная металлическая платформа практически не двигается, но вы замечаете, как стремительно растет уровень воды под сливными решетками.{/n}
{n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Огромная металлическая платформа практически не двигается, но вы замечаете, как стремительно растет уровень воды под сливными решетками.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}
{n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}
{n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巨大な金属製のプラットフォームはほとんど動いていないが、排水口の格子の下で水位が上昇しているスピードに気づいた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巨大な金属製のプラットフォームはほとんど動いていないが、排水口の格子の下で水位が上昇しているスピードに気づいた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La enorme plataforma de metal apenas se mueve, pero notas la velocidad a la que el nivel del agua se eleva bajo las rejillas de drenaje.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La enorme plataforma de metal apenas se mueve, pero notas la velocidad a la que el nivel del agua se eleva bajo las rejillas de drenaje.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巨大的金属平台几乎纹丝不动，但你注意到排水栅格下的水位涨得飞快。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巨大的金属平台几乎纹丝不动，但你注意到排水栅格下的水位涨得飞快。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die riesige Plattform bewegt sich kaum, aber du bemerkst, wie schnell das Wasser unter den Abflussgittern steigt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die riesige Plattform bewegt sich kaum, aber du bemerkst, wie schnell das Wasser unter den Abflussgittern steigt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Devasa metal platform, zar zor hareket ediyor. Drenaj ızgaralarının altında su seviyesinin ne kadar hızlı yükseldiğini fark ediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Devasa metal platform, zar zor hareket ediyor. Drenaj ızgaralarının altında su seviyesinin ne kadar hızlı yükseldiğini fark ediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'énorme plateforme métallique bouge à peine, mais à travers les grilles d'égout, vous remarquez que le niveau de l'eau monte à une vitesse alarmante.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'énorme plateforme métallique bouge à peine, mais à travers les grilles d'égout, vous remarquez que le niveau de l'eau monte à une vitesse alarmante.{/n}
